commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And the people shall take them, and bring them to their place: and the house of Israel shall possess them in the land of the LORD for servants and handmaids: and they shall take them captive, whose captives they were; and they shall rule over their oppressors. Cyrus probably granted an escort, as Artaxerxes did, 2 Esdras ii. They had purchased many slaves, (1 Esdras ii. ) as some were very rich in captivity, and were treated like other subjects. Stragglers of the army of Cambyses, though this was chiefly verified under the Machabees, Jeremias xxv.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
